name: Hub-Spoke Network Topology
problemStatement: Without it, teams deploy isolated VNets.

guardrails.rule: All spoke VNets must peer to hub

diagramSvg:
<svg width="900" height="600" viewBox="0 0 900 600" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arr-teal" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#0F6E56"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="900" height="600" fill="#EAF1FB"/>

  <!-- Title Bar -->
  <rect width="900" height="56" fill="#1B3A6B" rx="0"/>
  <text x="32" y="24" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="500" opacity="0.75">Network & Connectivity · Tier 2 — Logical</text>
  <text x="32" y="43" fill="white" font-size="18" font-weight="700">Hub-Spoke Network Topology</text>
  <text x="820" y="35" fill="white" font-size="11" opacity="0.7" text-anchor="middle">Strategic Intent:</text>
  <text x="820" y="49" fill="#7EC8B0" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Consistent topology</text>

  <!-- Hub Central Node -->
  <rect x="330" y="200" width="240" height="80" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <rect x="330" y="200" width="240" height="28" rx="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <rect x="330" y="214" width="240" height="14" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="450" y="219" fill="white" font-size="12" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Azure Virtual WAN Hub</text>
  <text x="450" y="248" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Central Hub</text>
  <text x="450" y="264" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Managed WAN connectivity</text>

  <!-- Spoke VNets -->
  <!-- Spoke 1 - Top Left -->
  <rect x="90" y="100" width="160" height="64" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <rect x="90" y="100" width="160" height="24" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <rect x="90" y="112" width="160" height="12" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="170" y="117" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Spoke VNet A</text>
  <text x="170" y="142" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Workload Network</text>
  <text x="170" y="156" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Peer → Hub</text>

  <!-- Spoke 2 - Top Right -->
  <rect x="650" y="100" width="160" height="64" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <rect x="650" y="100" width="160" height="24" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <rect x="650" y="112" width="160" height="12" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="730" y="117" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Spoke VNet B</text>
  <text x="730" y="142" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Workload Network</text>
  <text x="730" y="156" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Peer → Hub</text>

  <!-- Spoke 3 - Bottom Left -->
  <rect x="90" y="380" width="160" height="64" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <rect x="90" y="380" width="160" height="24" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <rect x="90" y="392" width="160" height="12" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="170" y="397" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Spoke VNet C</text>
  <text x="170" y="422" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Workload Network</text>
  <text x="170" y="436" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Peer → Hub</text>

  <!-- Spoke 4 - Bottom Right -->
  <rect x="650" y="380" width="160" height="64" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <rect x="650" y="380" width="160" height="24" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <rect x="650" y="392" width="160" height="12" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="730" y="397" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Spoke VNet D</text>
  <text x="730" y="422" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Workload Network</text>
  <text x="730" y="436" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Peer → Hub</text>

  <!-- Arrows: Spokes to Hub -->
  <!-- Spoke A to Hub -->
  <line x1="250" y1="132" x2="328" y2="222" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
  <!-- Spoke B to Hub -->
  <line x1="650" y1="132" x2="572" y2="222" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
  <!-- Spoke C to Hub -->
  <line x1="250" y1="412" x2="328" y2="322" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
  <!-- Spoke D to Hub -->
  <line x1="650" y1="412" x2="572" y2="322" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.8" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>

  <!-- Step label -->
  <rect x="380" y="330" width="140" height="22" rx="4" fill="#BA7517" opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="450" y="345" fill="#BA7517" font-size="10" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Step 1: VNet Peering</text>

  <!-- Related Pattern -->
  <rect x="300" y="490" width="300" height="70" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="450" y="510" fill="#BA7517" font-size="10" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">RELATED PATTERN</text>
  <text x="450" y="530" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">SC-002 Zero Trust Network</text>
  <text x="450" y="548" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Depends on</text>

  <line x1="450" y1="280" x2="450" y2="490" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
</svg>
